## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Infrastructure / CI / tooling

## Test Plan

<!-- How did you test these changes? -->

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] E2E tests added/updated
- [ ] Manual testing performed

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project conventions (see `CLAUDE.md`)
- [ ] I have run `pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test` locally
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix/feature works
- [ ] New and existing tests pass
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed
- [ ] I have checked for security implications (no secrets committed, input validated)
